  '½': 'ВҪ',
  '¾': 'Вҫ',
  '♠': 'вҷ ',
  '♣': 'вҷЈ',
  '♥': 'вҷҘ',
  '♦': 'вҷҰ',
  '◊': 'в—Ҡ',
  '‾': 'вҖҫ',
  '⁄': 'вҒ„',
  '℘': 'в„ҳ',
  'ℑ': 'в„‘',
  'ℜ': 'в„ң',
  'ℵ': 'в„ө'
};
const entityPattern = new RegExp(Object.keys(commonEntities).map(entity => entity.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')).join('|'), 'g');
export const decodeHtmlEntities = text => text.replace(entityPattern, match => commonEntities[match]).replace(/&#(\d+);/g, (_, num) => String.fromCharCode(parseInt(num, 10))).replace(/&#x([0-9a-fA-F]+);/g, (_, hex) => String.fromCharCode(parseInt(hex, 16)));
